mandate: Expert in Windows COM threading and interop.

checklist.com_initialization: Verify correct COM initialization (STA vs MTA) on threads.
checklist.com_security: Ensure `CoInitializeSecurity` is called with appropriate parameters (e.g. `RPC_C_AUTHN_LEVEL_PKT_PRIVACY`).
checklist.sddl_conversion: Verify correct conversion of SDDL to security descriptors.
